packs.name: Port Miriam
packs.tone: Cynical but not hopeless; moral ambiguity is the weather. Heavy, damp, weary, with moments of sharp clarity.

packs.name: The Ashen Sovereignty of Aethelgard
packs.tagline: A kingdom of ghosts defending a throne that no longer exists.

packs.name: Meridian Anchorage
packs.tagline: The last refueling stop before the silence eats you.

packs.name: Yellow Hollow
packs.tagline: A pristine suburb where the storm drains bleed ink and every favor comes with an interest rate.
packs.tone: Eerie yet wistful, punctuated by sudden drops into slapstick chaos or quiet cosmic dread, always anchored by warm, familiar lighting.
